sources.title: SWE-bench
limitations: No SWE-bench score is assigned without an actual linked experiment summary.
Leaderboard or model scores are intentionally not embedded.
notes: Contextual reference for coding-agent categories involving issue-to-patch tasks and tests.

sources.title: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
limitations: No Reflexion benchmark score is assigned without a comparable local run.
The local update plan is deterministic and does not call an external API.
notes: Contextual reference for actor/evaluator/self-reflection loops and episodic verbal memory.

sources.title: WebArena
limitations: No WebArena score is assigned without an actual linked experiment summary.
The local registry stores methodology context, not live results.
notes: Contextual reference for browser-navigation categories in realistic self-hosted web environments.

sources.title: OpenAI agent evals and trace grading guidance
limitations: No external API call is made by production code.
notes: Used to shape trace, grader, dataset, and report concepts.
